meta.title: Harbour Registry
meta.note: This registry lists publicly accessible content that applies or references Harbour vocabulary. Inclusion is descriptive, not evaluative. Omission reflects incomplete cataloguing, not exclusion.

status_definitions.draft: Early work, structure may change substantially.
status_definitions.candidate: Ready for discussion, structurally stable but not yet validated.
status_definitions.hold: Structurally stable but awaiting resolution of open flags or discriminant conditions.
status_definitions.archived: Historical record, no longer actively maintained.

entries.name: Ions-in-Freiburg
entries.description: Research-group instance applying Harbour structure to experimental quantum physics, documentation architecture, and pedagogical material.

entries.name: Open Society Docs
entries.description: Place-based and lived-experience interrogation of overlapping governance and social systems. Pilot dossier: Einern (bergisch-märkische Wasserscheide).

entries.name: T(h)reehouse +EC
entries.description: Non-commercial publication initiative demonstrating the ADM-EC deliberation protocol applied to complex, multi-perspective cases. Includes case archive, teaching stories, and kids' corner.

entries.name: Generator Layers (GLHC)
entries.domain: Archaeology, genomics, cultural heritage, trans-generational creative traditions
entries.description: Dual-layer dossier: falsifiable framework for assessing trans-generational creative transcendence (Coastline) plus site-by-site measurement ledger (Breakwater). Council-5 ADM-EC.

entries.name: The Accidental Question
entries.description: Plain-language outreach essay introducing the Generator Layers framework through the story of a grammatical slip that became a research question.

entries.name: Undetected Modes — Concept Note
entries.domain: Quantum optics, trapped ions, biomedical imaging
entries.description: Concept note proposing a trapped-ion analogue quantum simulator for studying open-system dynamics in quantum imaging with undetected photons (QIUP). Maps the formal SU(1,1) interferometer analogy. Open invitation to collaborate.

entries.name: The Geometry of Agreement
entries.description: Flagship narrative essay for the Causal Comparison Networks framework. Traces a single coordination geometry from Harrison's marine chronometers through railway time standardisation to modern trapped-ion clock networks. Introduces the causality bound, closure loops, heterogeneity requirement, and loud-failure mandate.

entries.name: The Bias I Carry
entries.description: Reflective essay on tribal bias in quantum physics communities. Examines how professional identity shapes which questions are taken seriously and which are dismissed.

entries.name: Consciousness in the Spotlight
entries.description: Essay examining consciousness-convergence claims through the Harbour lens. Companion piece to Breakwater ledger entry CL-2026-001 (consciousness-convergence → UNDERDETERMINED).

entries.name: Causal Clock Unification Framework (CCUF)
entries.description: Unifies clocks by causal geometry of phase comparison rather than oscillator physics. Three-length separation (source, apparatus, comparison). Deposited on Zenodo.

entries.name: IF-QTR
entries.description: Invariant Framework for Quantum-Traceable Refractometry. Constitutional document defining structural boundaries for refractometric measurement chains.
entries.url_note: Not yet publicly hosted; constitutional v0.3.0.

entries.name: Breakwater Claim Analysis Ledger — Introduction
entries.description: Canonical introduction to the Breakwater: Ledger Principle, three-value classification protocol (COMPATIBLE / UNDERDETERMINED / INCONSISTENT), safeguard stack, and audit trail requirements.

entries.name: Breakwater Layer — A Meta-Algorithm
entries.description: Algorithmic specification of the Breakwater as a meta-algorithm: classification pipeline, schema, and operational logic for reproducible claim analysis.

entries.name: Dossier: Hasse et al.
entries.description: Breakwater dossier evaluating the stroboscopic travelling-wave measurement scheme (Phys. Rev. A 109, 053105). Claim Analysis Ledger with 8 entries (3 compatible, 5 underdetermined). Includes framework, tutorial, and interactive numerics viewer.

entries.name: Dossier: Amazon Seasonal Discharge
entries.description: Breakwater dossier evaluating the claim that parts of the Amazon basin experience 'two annual flood waves.' Parameterised harmonic model with falsification steps. 5 ledger entries including ENSO-conditioned discriminants.

entries.name: Ulrich Warring — Professional Page
entries.description: Personal academic and professional page. Research interests, publications, teaching, and contact information.

entries.name: Rocket Science
entries.description: Open-source reproducible research platform. Deployed on GitHub Pages.

entries.name: Quantum Relaxation Ordering
entries.description: Open research programme on the quantum Mpemba effect in trapped-ion systems. Dossier, falsifiable framework, tutorials, and Python/QuTiP numerics pipeline. Open to collaboration.

entries.name: BSM Capstone Pilot
entries.description: "One Propagator, Three Regimes" — BSM Capstone pilot project for advanced physics students. GitHub Pages site with associated materials.

entries.name: Numerical Clock Networks
entries.description: MSc-level laboratory experiment on numerical simulation of optical clock networks. GitHub Pages site with experiment instructions and materials.
